---
title: "Discrete with extinction"
author: "Caleb"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## Load trees

```{r}

library(treats)

bd_params <- make.bd.params(speciation = 1, extinction = 0.7)

stop_rule <- list(max.living = 50)
set.seed(11)

mass_extinction <- make.events(
                      target       = "taxa",
                      condition    = age.condition(5),
                      modification = random.extinction(0.70))



# selective_extinction <- make.events(
#       target = "taxa",
#       condition = age.condition(x = 8, condition = `==`),
#       condition = trait.extinction(x = 0, condition = `>`),
#       event.name = "Trait-based extinction"
#     )

trait.extinction <- make.events(
                      target = "taxa",
                      condition = age.condition(6),
                      modification = trait.extinction(x = 2,
                                                      condition = `<`))

bm <- make.traits(process = BM.process, n = 3)
ou <- make.traits(process = OU.process, n = 3)

## simulate selective extinction
bm_traits <- treats(traits = bm, stop.rule = stop_rule, bd.params = bd_params, null.error = 10000, replicates = 5, events = trait.extinction)

ou_traits <- treats(traits = ou, stop.rule = stop_rule, bd.params = bd_params, null.error = 10000, replicates = 5, events = trait.extinction)


bm_traits <- lapply(bm_traits, drop.singles)
ou_traits <- lapply(ou_traits, drop.singles)

cont_traits <- list(bm = bm_traits, ou = ou_traits)



```

```{R}


# bm <- make.traits(process = BM.process, n = 100)
# ou <- make.traits(process = OU.process, n = 100)
# # random_cont <- make.traits(process = no.process, n = 100)

# bm_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree){
#     mapped <- map.traits(bm, tree)
#     matrix <- mapped$data
#     return(matrix)
# })
# ou_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree){
#     mapped <- map.traits(ou, tree)
#     matrix <- mapped$data
#     return(matrix)
# })
# # random_cont_matrices <- lapply(trees, function(tree){
# #     mapped <- map.traits(random_cont, tree)
# #     matrix <- mapped$data
# #     return(matrix)
# # })

# continuous_matrices <- list(bm = bm_traits, ou = ou_matrices)


```


```{R}

source("../Functions/fossil.pres.R")

preservation <- list(all = 1.0, high = 0.5, med = 0.15, low = 0.05)


fossil_matrices <- lapply(cont_traits, function(model){
  lapply(model, function(rep){
    lapply(preservation, function(pres){
    matrix <- rep$data
    tree <- rep$tree
    tree <- collapse.singles(tree)
    pres <- fossil.pres(tree, matrix, preservation = pres, type = "continuous")
    return(pres)
    })
  })
})


# test <- multi.ace(living[[1]]$matrix, tree = living[[1]]$tree, models = "BM", output = "combined")


# rownames(fossil_matrices[[1]]$low$matrix) == fossil_matrices[[1]]$low$tree$tip.label

test <- multi.ace(fossil_matrices$bm[[3]]$all$matrix, tree = fossil_matrices$bm[[3]]$all$tree, models = "BM")


aced <- lapply(fossil_matrices, lapply, lapply,  function(level){
  matrix <- level$matrix
  tree <- level$tree
  output <- multi.ace(matrix, tree = tree, models = "BM", output = "combined")
  return(output)
})


```
